inputs.label: Troy Pound Amount
inputs.businessContext: Weight in troy pounds to be converted to kilograms

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounded outputs

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical items to calculate total weight for

inputs.label: Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplicative calibration correction factor for the weighing scale

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±%)
inputs.businessContext: Relative measurement uncertainty percentage for conformance bounds

formulas.kgRounded: Math.round((rawKg + Number.EPSILON) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
formulas.lowerRounded: Math.round((lower + Number.EPSILON) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
formulas.upperRounded: Math.round((upper + Number.EPSILON) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
